issue.title: Batch operations follow-up: shift+click range, bulk remove-label, bulk YOLO, bulk assign-to-release

phases.title: Shift+click range selection on KanbanCard + IssueCard checkboxes (per-surface anchor)
verification: `selectionStore.ts` exports `rangeSelect(surface, surfaceIssueNumbers, targetIssueNumber)` action.
`anchorBySurfaceByProject` state field added; `toggle(n, surface?)` updates the anchor when surface is provided; `clear()` resets the anchor map.

`KanbanCard.tsx` checkbox `onClick` detects `e.shiftKey` and dispatches `rangeSelect` with surface key `kanban:${columnId}`; also passes `surface` to plain `toggle` so the anchor advances on every click.
`IssueCard.tsx` (or issues-list inline JSX) wires the same with surface key `issues-list`.
Range fallback when anchor no longer in surface: behaves as a plain toggle (no crash, no empty selection).
`apps/desktop/src/stores/__tests__/selectionStoreRange.test.ts` adds 4 vitest cases (no-anchor, ascending, descending, fallback).
`pnpm build` clean; `pnpm test` desktop count 105 → 109 (+4).
phases.summary: Added `anchorBySurfaceByProject` state + `rangeSelect(surface, surfaceIssueNumbers, target)` action to selectionStore; `toggle` now accepts an optional surface param to advance the anchor. KanbanCard takes `columnId`+`surfaceIssueNumbers` props (DragOverlay passes 'drag-overlay'/[]); IssueCard takes `surfaceIssueNumbers` from IssuesSection's filteredIssues. Both checkbox handlers detect e.shiftKey and dispatch rangeSelect. 4 vitest cases added (105→109).

phases.title: Bulk remove-label action in BulkActionToolbar (label picker shows union-of-labels-on-selected)
verification: `BulkActionToolbar.tsx` adds a `bulkRemoveLabel` handler that fans out `edit_github_issue({ removeLabels: [name] })` per selected issue with Promise.all + per-issue failure tracking.
Toolbar renders a 'Remove label' button next to 'Add label'; opens a `<LabelPickerPopover mode='remove' selectedIssueNumbers={selected}>` instance.

`LabelPickerPopover.tsx` accepts `mode?: 'add' | 'remove'` (defaults to 'add') + `selectedIssueNumbers?: number[]`; when mode='remove', fetches each selected issue via `fetch_github_issue_by_number` and shows the union of applied labels.
`unionLabels(issues)` helper exported as a pure function; deduplicates by label name; returns [] for empty input.
Empty-union case shows a clear message in the picker; user can Cancel.
`apps/desktop/src/components/__tests__/labelPickerUnion.test.ts` adds 3 vitest cases (empty, dedupe, single-issue-multi-label).
`pnpm build` clean; `pnpm test` desktop count 109 → 112 (+3).
phases.summary: Extracted `unionLabels(issues)` as a pure exported helper in LabelPickerPopover; added `mode?: 'add'|'remove'` + `selectedIssueNumbers?` props that fetch each selected issue via `fetch_github_issue_by_number` and show the union with a 'Labels applied to selection (union)' caption. BulkActionToolbar gained a 'Remove label' button + `bulkRemoveLabel` handler that fans out `edit_github_issue({ removeLabels })` with per-issue failure tracking. Opening one popover closes the other. 3 vitest cases (109→112).

phases.title: Bulk assign-to-release: open ReleaseDialog pre-populated with selected issues + file bulk-YOLO follow-up
verification: `BulkActionToolbar.tsx` adds an 'Add to release' button that calls `useReleaseDialogStore.openDialog` with a pre-populated `{ version: '', issues: [...] }` synthesized from the selection + the issues store's titles.
Selection is NOT cleared on click (user may cancel the dialog).
If `useReleaseDialogStore` needs an `initialIssues` opts arg to surface pre-populated issues to the dialog cleanly, extend `openDialog` accordingly with the smaller diff path.
`buildPrePopulatedRelease(selected, allIssues)` extracted to `apps/desktop/src/components/bulkAssignHelpers.ts`; pure function with title-fallback to `#N`.
2 vitest cases for `buildPrePopulatedRelease` (match-by-number, fallback). Desktop count 112 → 114.
`pnpm build` clean.
Plan summary notes that the parent agent should file a bulk-YOLO follow-up issue after merge.
phases.summary: Extended `useReleaseDialogStore.openDialog(release?, opts?)` with `initialIssues` (cleaner than overloading `editingRelease` which would force edit-mode title). ReleaseDialog accepts `initialIssues?` prop and seeds `selectedIssues` from it on open in create-mode. Extracted `buildPrePopulatedRelease(selected, allIssues)` to bulkAssignHelpers.ts with title-fallback to `#N`. BulkActionToolbar's 'Add to release' button calls `openReleaseDialog(undefined, { initialIssues })` without clearing the selection. 2 vitest cases (112→114). Bulk YOLO deferred — parent agent should file a follow-up issue after merge.
